name: Dried Apple Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples thoroughly.
2. Remove the core from three or four apples using the apple corer.
3. Thread a piece of string through each apple and tie a knot.
4. Hang the apples outside in direct sunlight to dry, or place them on a rack in an oven preheated to 150 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Once the apples are completely dried, remove the strings.
6. Slice and enjoy your homemade dried apple snacks.
